zh.North Cadbury, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特諾斯 卡德波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Moels於大約1304年出生在英國薩默塞特時，他的父親John de Moels 1st Baron Moels36歲，母親Maud de Grey35歲。他和Lady Joan Lovel至少有2個女兒。他去世於1337年8月21日之前在英國英格蘭，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾。

zh-hans.North Cadbury, Somerset, England: 英国薩默塞特諾斯 卡德波利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Moels于大约1304年出生在英国薩默塞特时，他的父亲John de Moels 1st Baron Moels36岁，母亲Maud de Grey35岁。他和Lady Joan Lovel至少有2个女儿。他去世于1337年8月21日之前在英国英格兰，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Moels
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Moll , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Catalan: habitational name from any of various minor places called Moles, from the plural of mola (see Mola ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Meulles (Calvados). See also   Moyles  .

variants.name: Moll
meanings: English (Norfolk): from the Middle English female personal name Moll(e), Mol, a common pet form of Maud (see Mould and Maude ).

English (Norfolk): nickname from Middle English molle, mol(e), moul ‘mole’ (the burrowing animal), given perhaps to someone who wore moleskin, a mole catcher, or to someone with poor sight, or alternatively from Middle English mol ‘effeminate man’.
German: nickname from a dialect term for a plump, stout person. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Poland.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Moels was born about 1304, in Somerset, England, his father, John de Moels 1st Baron Moels, was 36 and his mother, Maud de Grey, was 35. He had at least 2 daughters with Lady Joan Lovel. He died before 21 August 1337, in England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Moels est né environ 1304, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, John de Moels 1st Baron Moels, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Maud de Grey, avait 35 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Lady Joan Lovel. Il est décédé avant 21 août 1337, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Moels um 1304 in Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Moels 1st Baron Moels 36 und seine Mutter Maud de Grey 35. Er hatte mit Lady Joan Lovel mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 21. August 1337 in England, United Kingdom und wurde in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Moels è nato il circa 1304 nel Somerset, England, il suo padre, John de Moels 1st Baron Moels, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Grey, aveva 35 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie con Lady Joan Lovel. Morì prima del 21 agosto 1337, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Wincanton, Somerset, England: イギリスソメルセトウィンカントン
ja.North Cadbury, Somerset, England: イギリスソメルセトノース カドブリー
ja.Marnhull, Dorset, England: イギリスドールセトマルンハル
ja.Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdo: イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Moelsが約1304年にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父John de Moels 1st Baron Moelsは36歳，母Maud de Greyは35歳であった。彼はLady Joan Lovelとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1337年8月21日以前にイギリスイギリスで死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Moels(이)가 대략 1304년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Moels 1st Baron Moels(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Grey(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Lady Joan Lovel(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1337년 8월 21일 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

mn.about 1304–Bef 21 August 1337: ойролцоогоор 1304 он–1337 оны Наймдугаар сарын 21–наас өмнө
mn.North Cadbury, Somerset, England: North Cadbury, Bro an Hañv, Английн

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Moels nasceu aproximadamente 1304, em Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Moels 1st Baron Moels, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Grey, tinha 35 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Lady Joan Lovel. Ele faleceu antes 21 de agosto de 1337, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Moels родился около 1304 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Moels 1st Baron Moels было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Grey, 35. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Lady Joan Lovel. Он умер перед 21 августа 1337 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.about 1304–Bef 21 August 1337: e tusa o le 1304–a'e le'I oo le 21 Aukuso 1337

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Moels nació aproximadamente 1304, en Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Moels 1st Baron Moels, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Maud de Grey, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Lady Joan Lovel. Murió antes de 21 de agosto de 1337, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
